text: We may have even less control over how long we live than previously thought - The Washington Post
fullText: A study resets the longevity discussion, after previous research focused on those born between 1870 and 1900, and shows genetics and environment play roughly equal roles.

text: An Indiana man is poisoned with a root beer float. How a robbery revealed a sinister plot to kill - CBS News
fullText: When Harold Allen died suddenly in his home in Freetown, Indiana, no one suspected anything out of the ordinary. Nine months later, a burglary at his home would lead to a murder investigation and an unusual weapon.

text: Michigan beat up Arizona and took its lunch money in a Final Four drubbing. Only UConn stands in the way of a title - CNN

text: New global LDS Primary leadership includes a historic choice: the first African president - The Salt Lake Tribune
fullText: The LDS Church names a new trio of women to lead its worldwide Primary organization for children. An African native is the new president, the first to ever head a churchwide organization.

text: Microsoft spent years pushing Copilot, but now it says don’t rely on it - Digital Trends
